name: sap-dev
description: SAP GUI automation plugins for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: sap-dev-core
plugins.description: Core SAP development utilities and ABAP Workbench automation. Includes login, connection management, credential storage with Windows DPAPI encryption, BDC execution via RFC, add-on table maintenance, table data query / TSV download via SE16N, transport request creation via SE01, function group creation via SE37, the check-and-fix router, object activation, ATC quality gate, package reassignment, RFC wrapper generation, structured JSONL logging and log analysis, and SAP GUI Scripting for SE01, SE21, SE38, SE37, SE24, SE11, SE16N, SE19, SE41, SE51, SE54, SE91, CMOD, and GUI recording. Keywords: SAP GUI, SAP Logon, login automation, connection management, stored credentials, DPAPI, BDC, ABAP4_CALL_TRANSACTION, RFC, add-on maintenance, transport request, function group, package, ATC, activate, RFC wrapper, log analysis, SE01, SE21, SE38, SE37, SE24, SE11, SE16N, SE19, SE41, SE51, SE54, SE91, CMOD, check and fix, table query, deploy, activate, SAP GUI Scripting

plugins.name: sap-gen-code
plugins.description: ABAP code generation and validation. /sap-docs-layout customizes the spec template's structural layout via a self-describing (Meta) Layout sheet; /sap-docs-extract reads Excel/Word/PDF specs and produces structured artefacts; /sap-docs-convert applies customer-specific normalisation rules (field/type/flag remap, schema migration); /sap-gen-abap produces ABAP source per Customer Brief profile; /sap-check-abap and /sap-check-fm validate naming, types, SQL fields, and CALL FUNCTION parameters via live RFC; /sap-fix-abap and /sap-fix-fm auto-patch detected issues. Keywords: ABAP code generation, design document, spec template layout, naming conventions, type check, SQL validation, FM parameter check, auto-fix, spec conversion, rules-driven normalisation

plugins.name: sap-tcd
plugins.description: SAP transaction automation for business processes. Manages Business Partners via BP, Material Masters via MM01/MM02/MM03, and Sales Orders via VA01/VA02/VA03 with create/update/check operations. Keywords: Business Partner, Material Master, Sales Order, BP, MM01, VA01, transaction automation
